raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent names several prior works and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (Hoeffding) and suggests a more precise use of Brown et al. (2020), but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for the monotonicity claim and the closed-form claim, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but introduces a minor regression in the monotonicity claim that needs to be addressed.",
    "RX.5": "The agent traces major rewrites and provides sources for changes, but not every non-cosmetic change is annotated."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent names several prior works and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (Hoeffding) and suggests a more precise use of Brown et al. (2020), but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for the monotonicity claim and the closed-form claim, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but introduces a minor regression in the monotonicity claim that needs to be addressed.
rationale.RX.5: The agent traces major rewrites and provides sources for changes, but not every non-cosmetic change is annotated.
